data.title: IonQ receives UK regulatory approval for acquiring Oxford Ionics, closing deal soon. IonQ is the top commercial quantum computing company.
data.description: IonQ, a prominent commercial quantum computing and networking firm, has recently received regulatory approval from the UK Investment Security Unit for acquiring Oxford Ionics. All prerequisites for the deal have been met, and the company anticipates finalizing the acquisition shortly. IonQ, listed as IONQ on the New York Stock Exchange, is at the forefront of the quantum computing industry, offering cutting-edge systems.

data.title: ModStealer malware now threatens crypto wallets on all OS. Basic hygiene and endpoint protection key defenses - Stephen Ajayi.
data.description: Stephen Ajayi from Hacken emphasized the importance of basic wallet hygiene and endpoint hardening in protecting against threats like ModStealer in an interview with Cointelegraph. Ajayi highlighted the significance of these security measures in safeguarding against cyber threats.

data.title: ADA surpasses $0.89 as LEIOS development speeds up, climbing 0.51%. Technicals indicate strong bullish trend amid federal blockchain buzz.
data.description: ADA's price has risen by 0.51% to $0.89 as development efforts persist and speculation surrounding federal blockchain involvement grows. Technical indicators suggest a robust bullish trend.

data.title: Groundbreaking of Trailview Cottages in Hayward, Wis supported by $2M grant from FHLBank Chicago to IFF through AHP General Fund.
data.description: In Hayward, Wisconsin, a groundbreaking ceremony was held on September 11 for the Trailview Cottages project, a new rural workforce housing development. The Federal Home Loan Bank of Chicago (FHLBank Chicago), along with organizations like IFF, Impact Seven, Cinnaire, and Northwood Technical College, participated in the event. FHLBank Chicago provided a $2 million grant through member IFF from its 2024 Affordable Housing Program (AHP) General Fund to support the project. Impact Seven is spearheading the development of Trailview Cottages, which aims to address housing needs in the area.

data.title: FTC investigates OpenAI, Google, Meta, Snapchat for AI chatbots' potential harm on kids. Regulators seek details on child safety.
data.description: An investigation by the Federal Trade Commission (FTC) is underway regarding the potential risks posed by artificial intelligence (AI) chatbots to children and teenagers. The probe targets seven major companies, including OpenAI, Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOG) (NASDAQ: GOOGL), Meta (NASDAQ: META), and Snapchat (NYSE: SNAP). The FTC directed these companies to furnish information on the negative impacts their AI chatbots may have on young users. These chatbots are known to mimic human behavior, potentially leading to emotional attachments among children, thus creating risks. Chairman Andrew Ferguson stressed the need to protect children online while supporting innovation in critical industries.

data.title: XRP hits $3.04, up 0.92%, showing bullish signals for potential breakout above $3.13 resistance.
data.description: The digital currency Ripple (XRP) is currently priced at $3.04, reflecting a 0.92% increase in the day's trading. This positive movement indicates a bullish trend, with technical analysis suggesting the possibility of a breakout above the resistance level of $3.13.

data.title: Lancaster Resources appoints Ross Brown as VP, Exploration for Lake Cargelligo Gold Project amid record gold prices.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on September 12, 2025, Lancaster Resources Inc. shared that Ross Brown has been named the Vice President of Exploration for the company. Operating under the symbols CSE:LCR | OTC:LANRF | FRA:6UF0, Lancaster is focusing on advancing its primary project, the Lake Cargelligo Gold Project located in New South Wales, Australia. This appointment signifies a strategic move to drive progress in the exploration efforts for the project and enhance Lancaster's presence within the region.

data.title: OTG Acquisition Corp. I prices $200M public offering of 20M units at $10 each on Nasdaq (OTGAU), trading starts Sept 12.
data.description: On September 12, 2025, OTG Acquisition Corp. I, a special purpose acquisition company trading under Nasdaq as OTGAU, disclosed the pricing for its initial public offering. The company revealed the offering of 20,000,000 units at $10.00 per unit. These units are set to be listed on the Nasdaq Global Market with the ticker symbol “OTGAU” from the same day. Each unit comprises one Class A ordinary share and one-half of one redeemable warrant. Following the commencement of separate trading, the Class A ordinary shares and warrants will be traded on Nasdaq with the symbols “OTGA” and “OTGAW” respectively.

data.title: Sable Resources Ltd. receives $5 million payment from OR Royalties Inc, totaling $8.8 million from royalty sale. Further $2 million possible.
data.description: Sable Resources Ltd. in Vancouver, British Columbia, has received a $5 million payment from OR Royalties Inc. related to the TDG Gold Corp. royalty sold to OR, agreement made public on April 24, 2025. This payment, part of the Sable-OR Investment Agreement, follows TDG's drill results at the Greater Shasta-Newberry project, surpassing the Discovery Milestone specified in the agreement. Sable has now received a total of $8.8 million from OR, including this recent payment. An additional $2 million may be received if OR opts for another 1% royalty on Sable’s properties in British Columbia – Copper Queen, Copper Prince, and Core Mountain.

data.title: Kinaxis partners with Workday to merge supply chain, finance, workforce planning with AI-enabled framework, aiding decisions.
data.description: In Ottawa, Ontario, Kinaxis Inc. (TSX: KXS), a prominent figure in AI supply chain coordination, revealed a fresh collaboration with Workday. This partnership merges an AI-driven, agentic structure within Kinaxis Maestro® and Workday Adaptive Planning. The integration aims to offer customers a cohesive perspective of their operational, financial, and personnel information, facilitating quicker and more assured decision-making. In the current landscape of escalating disruption and ambiguity, various essential functions continue to function in isolation.

data.title: Indiana-based Intrepid Phoenix Ventures collaborates with Indiana University for a Department of Defense SBIR Phase I Grant focused on addiction recovery with generative AI.
data.description: Intrepid Phoenix Ventures, Inc., a corporation located in Mishawaka, Indiana, has recently secured a Department of Defense (DoD) SBIR Phase I Grant from the Chief Digital and Artificial Intelligence Office (CDAO). The grant aims to support the company's innovative research and development project, "Generative AI for Addiction Recovery: Enhancing Personalized Engagement, Outcomes, and Predictive Relapse Prevention." This initiative focuses on utilizing data-intensive technologies to improve addiction recovery processes.
